servinfo.title: Precautions for Replacing BCM (Ignition Switch Model)

item.ptxt: When replacing the BCM, replace it with a new one.
After BCM is replaced with new one, perform “Immobilizer Key Registration” using SUZUKI scan tool.
When BCM and ECM are replaced at the same time, refer to ECM Registration:Ignition Switch Model for their registration.
All of ignition keys must be ready for the registration.
